posts.text:
Chinese banks are backtracking from the Middle East after record exposure:

Chinese banks lent a record $15.7 billion to Gulf states in 2025.

Lending has quadrupled from 2024 and up +2,428% since 2022.

Abu Dhabi National Oil Co., the UAE's biggest oil producer, was even preparing its first-ever yuan-denominated bond, which could have raised up to $2 billion.

Now, those plans have been halted following US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

Furthermore, several Chinese financial firms are reducing exposure to Middle Eastern debt, while Hong Kong and Chinese regulators have directed banks to review and report all regional exposure.

China's Gulf lending boom is pausing.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Been thinking a lot about why a lot of my close friends bought $hg $hgraf in an atypical way when I first started talking about it. 

Several if my oldest friends actually called me up and said ‘I’ve never seen you so excited about a stock before’

I answered that I’ve never seen or even dreamed about a stock with so much upside and ridiculous risk reward in my life.  Beyond that I said, all my years of studying economic history and stock market bubbles.  I don’t know if a better set up. 

So there’s two things to unpack.  First. I wrote a book and a crafted a model of how the human brain works and our focus and attention operates in a fractal of how single cells function. (Which makes total sense because we are nothing more than an extension of all cells that collaborate to make us walk and talk) 

The consciousness model we called the C4 model.  It’s on my website http://www.energeticmedia.com

In a nutshell what I’m saying is that the triggers for get cellular attention is energy.  A flash of light, a sound wave, heat, electricity etc.  

There’s no top down single control mechanism for our attention.  Example. When you are relaxed and calm you notice a mosquito land on your arm before it bites you. When you are in a frantic battle you might not notice you’ve been shot until after the battle ends 

You can be having an intense convo and accidentally burn a finger or step on something sharp. The pain singles from a small group of cells get the attention of the entire organism that is you. 

This attention grabbing from cells is performed with energetic messages the amplitude and frequency being key.  Erratic high frequency messages are distressing and trigger fight or flight.  Example.hearing another person or animal screaming in pain.  

Harmonic frequencies can help trigger calming states and silence is the most calming. Nothing to process at all. Rest and digest. 

Bottom line.  A very small group of cells can command the attention of an organism. When they do, we can think of them as being powerful biological influencers in that moment.

This obviously extends to society. When we see someone extremely excited it attracts attention. The more a group gets excited the more it grows.  

This ties in nicely with 
“Narrative Economics: How Stories Go Viral and Drive Major Economic Events by Robert J. Shiller. 

My C4 model explains with biological why a stocks end up becoming a viral phenomenon.  My book is a guide to developing the skills to see these patterns early and stay the course with them. 

Working with my son on Book 2 of the energetic investor and using the exact principles outlined in the energetic investor led to my confidence and conviction in the company to invested. 

I’ll next year we will probably release this next book (I’m telling the story of graphene and work we did finding hydrograph and doing due diligence)  story is far from over and I want to cover the major catalysts I see coming and document them as they occur for the story.  Noting the market reaction each time as validation of the predictions leads to a broader societies confidence and therefore investment in $hg $hgraf just like what we’ve seen as the EPA approval came.  

Like Jim Rogers says.  You can’t wait for all the news to be confirmed.  You must predict if that news will come and invest ahead. Buffett is the master of looking 10 years out in the spaces he knows well. Thats the game. 

Predict the future correctly and get paid. 

Predict it wrong and lose money

Pardon the typos. Stream of consciousness and I’m going for breakfast now.  Have a good weekend.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
